patch.value: Scope: measure uncovered files/branches, add deterministic tests and/or justified coverage instrumentation updates, then raise vitest thresholds to 100 for lines/branches/functions/statements with green full-suite verification.
Drive repository coverage gate back to 100 percent
Restore strict 100% coverage governance by closing remaining uncovered branches/lines and enforcing 100/100/100/100 thresholds in repository test coverage policy.
node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage passes with lines/branches/functions/statements all at 100% under enforced thresholds; regressions remain green; coverage policy docs and changelog are updated.

Net-new scope because no active open item tracks repository-wide return to strict 100% coverage gate.
